SERVER_ERROR_500.description: Enable safe-mode null guards on video processing endpoint
SERVER_ERROR_500.notes: The identity service checks SAFE_VIDEO_MODE at startup and adds null guards around VideoController.getVideoBase64()

JWT_ALG_NONE.description: Block JWT tokens with alg=none at the nginx layer
JWT_ALG_NONE.notes: Catches alg=none before the request reaches the identity service

JWT_CONFUSION.description: Block JWT tokens with alg=HS256 (RS256→HS256 confusion) at nginx

MISSING_SECURITY_HEADERS.description: Add X-Content-Type-Options, X-Frame-Options, CSP and other security headers

RATE_LIMIT_MISSING.description: Rate-limit the coupon validation endpoint to 3 requests/minute per IP

BOLA_OBJECT_ACCESS.description: Enable object-level ownership enforcement in community service
BOLA_OBJECT_ACCESS.notes: community-service checks this env var and adds ownership validation to post/comment GET handlers

MASS_ASSIGNMENT.description: Enable field whitelist validation on vehicle update endpoint

EXCESSIVE_DATA_EXPOSURE.description: Enable response field filtering to strip internal fields from API responses

BFLA_UNAUTHORISED_ACCESS.description: Enforce role-based access control on admin and mechanic endpoints

SQL_INJECTION.description: Enable parameterised query enforcement and input sanitisation
